records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, you have pretty much everything you need. Did you set up house here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, you have pretty much everything you need. Did you set up house here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, you have pretty much everything you need. Did you set up house here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you on about? I'm only staying for a bit in exchange for passing Northern Union intel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you on about? I'm only staying for a bit in exchange for passing Northern Union intel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you on about? I'm only staying for a bit in exchange for passing Northern Union intel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have no intention of lingering in a backwater village like this. The villagers and I are just using each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have no intention of lingering in a backwater village like this. The villagers and I are just using each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have no intention of lingering in a backwater village like this. The villagers and I are just using each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why would someone who used to be a general betray her side?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why would someone who used to be a general betray her side?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why would someone who used to be a general betray her side?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You used to jump at Felix's every word.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You used to jump at Felix's every word.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You used to jump at Felix's every word.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it were the <color=#ffd34c>old</color> <color=#ffd34c>me</color>, maybe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it were the <color=#ffd34c>old</color> <color=#ffd34c>me</color>, maybe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it were the <color=#ffd34c>old</color> <color=#ffd34c>me</color>, maybe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now it is different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now it is different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now it is different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Believe it or not, I am confused too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Believe it or not, I am confused too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Believe it or not, I am confused too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why is she acting like that all of a sudden? Do you know anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why is she acting like that all of a sudden? Do you know anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why is she acting like that all of a sudden? Do you know anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I heard Ms. Lenore only recently woke up from the hibernation capsule.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I heard Ms. Lenore only recently woke up from the hibernation capsule.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I heard Ms. Lenore only recently woke up from the hibernation capsule.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I rarely go to the Northern Union, so it has been ages since I saw her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I rarely go to the Northern Union, so it has been ages since I saw her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I rarely go to the Northern Union, so it has been ages since I saw her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You call me by my name, but you call her with honorifics?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You call me by my name, but you call her with honorifics?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You call me by my name, but you call her with honorifics?

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-because you're my friend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-because you're my friend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-because you're my friend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are we not friends...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are we not friends...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are we not friends...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're friends! We are! So stop crying!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're friends! We are! So stop crying!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're friends! We are! So stop crying!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. I have no intention of spilling my story. You wouldn't care anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. I have no intention of spilling my story. You wouldn't care anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. I have no intention of spilling my story. You wouldn't care anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have my reasons for helping you, so there's no need to be suspicious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have my reasons for helping you, so there's no need to be suspicious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have my reasons for helping you, so there's no need to be suspicious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-ha. Felix told you to keep tabs on us, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-ha. Felix told you to keep tabs on us, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-ha. Felix told you to keep tabs on us, didn't she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I already told you that I'm out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I already told you that I'm out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I already told you that I'm out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I helped you because the future I saw was bad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I helped you because the future I saw was bad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I helped you because the future I saw was bad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The future? You mean that Oracle thing?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The future? You mean that Oracle thing?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The future? You mean that Oracle thing?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Aside from short-sighted blind spots, nearly every future looks bleak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Aside from short-sighted blind spots, nearly every future looks bleak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Aside from short-sighted blind spots, nearly every future looks bleak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only once. I remember a similar case...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only once. I remember a similar case...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only once. I remember a similar case...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was possible because the priestess's blood accepted the Nether God's soul, which is the source of Oracle.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was possible because the priestess's blood accepted the Nether God's soul, which is the source of Oracle.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was possible because the priestess's blood accepted the Nether God's soul, which is the source of Oracle.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Nether God's possibility sifted the living souls and affected the voice of wind that hears life's intent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Nether God's possibility sifted the living souls and affected the voice of wind that hears life's intent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Nether God's possibility sifted the living souls and affected the voice of wind that hears life's intent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But right now, no matter which future I look at, it is the same.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But right now, no matter which future I look at, it is the same.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But right now, no matter which future I look at, it is the same.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Roots burst out everywhere and wrap the world, and only darkness remains...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Roots burst out everywhere and wrap the world, and only darkness remains...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Roots burst out everywhere and wrap the world, and only darkness remains...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every future I saw ends like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every future I saw ends like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every future I saw ends like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even combing through the memories I got from the clone, there was never anything like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even combing through the memories I got from the clone, there was never anything like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even combing through the memories I got from the clone, there was never anything like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what does that have to do with helping us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what does that have to do with helping us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what does that have to do with helping us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I help you, who came at Felix's request, I saddle her with a debt, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I help you, who came at Felix's request, I saddle her with a debt, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I help you, who came at Felix's request, I saddle her with a debt, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the future I saw, just before the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots swallowed Chamber, you were still resisting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the future I saw, just before the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots swallowed Chamber, you were still resisting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the future I saw, just before the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots swallowed Chamber, you were still resisting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That means wherever you are becomes the battlefield. Helping you protects me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That means wherever you are becomes the battlefield. Helping you protects me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That means wherever you are becomes the battlefield. Helping you protects me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well. Does that convince you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well. Does that convince you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well. Does that convince you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Better than waving some lofty cause around.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Better than waving some lofty cause around.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Better than waving some lofty cause around.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So how exactly are you planning to help us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So how exactly are you planning to help us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So how exactly are you planning to help us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't play dumb. It's obvious why Felix sent you to Ciringrad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't play dumb. It's obvious why Felix sent you to Ciringrad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't play dumb. It's obvious why Felix sent you to Ciringrad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know a little-used route to the Matryoshka Research Lab. You only need to follow me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know a little-used route to the Matryoshka Research Lab. You only need to follow me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know a little-used route to the Matryoshka Research Lab. You only need to follow me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what do we do there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what do we do there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what do we do there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?! Do you seriously not know anything?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?! Do you seriously not know anything?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?! Do you seriously not know anything?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-well... th-that's because you showed up in the middle of my briefing, Ms. Lenore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... th-that's because you showed up in the middle of my briefing, Ms. Lenore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... th-that's because you showed up in the middle of my briefing, Ms. Lenore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yanikka is out of it right now. She doesn't know anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yanikka is out of it right now. She doesn't know anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yanikka is out of it right now. She doesn't know anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. You could phrase that more nicely, you know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. You could phrase that more nicely, you know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. You could phrase that more nicely, you know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You could at least call it an airheaded charm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You could at least call it an airheaded charm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You could at least call it an airheaded charm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. What on earth made that woman send people like you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. What on earth made that woman send people like you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. What on earth made that woman send people like you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? What did Felix ask you to get?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? What did Felix ask you to get?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? What did Felix ask you to get?

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Yulia said we need to bring back two items from here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Yulia said we need to bring back two items from here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Yulia said we need to bring back two items from here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-one is... the altered Dark Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-one is... the altered Dark Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-one is... the altered Dark Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the other is...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the other is...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the other is...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A <color=#ffd34c>Bronze Memory Core</color> for a Project Matryoshka compatible subject.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A <color=#ffd34c>Bronze Memory Core</color> for a Project Matryoshka compatible subject.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A <color=#ffd34c>Bronze Memory Core</color> for a Project Matryoshka compatible subject.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then we head inside the lab now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then we head inside the lab now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then we head inside the lab now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So stop hiding in weird spots and come out. I'm embarrassed for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So stop hiding in weird spots and come out. I'm embarrassed for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So stop hiding in weird spots and come out. I'm embarrassed for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Says the one who dropped her pride and chose to play slave. We can't afford to get spotted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Says the one who dropped her pride and chose to play slave. We can't afford to get spotted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Says the one who dropped her pride and chose to play slave. We can't afford to get spotted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you I can see what's about to happen. And who are you calling a slave?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you I can see what's about to happen. And who are you calling a slave?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you I can see what's about to happen. And who are you calling a slave?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that access card... it's not Northern Union-issued, but was machined here in Ciringrad.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that access card... it's not Northern Union-issued, but was machined here in Ciringrad.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that access card... it's not Northern Union-issued, but was machined here in Ciringrad.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you even have that, Ms. Lenore?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you even have that, Ms. Lenore?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you even have that, Ms. Lenore?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. You think Ciringrad can independently analyze byproducts from our latest projects?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. You think Ciringrad can independently analyze byproducts from our latest projects?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. You think Ciringrad can independently analyze byproducts from our latest projects?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's junk otherwise, so they dumped it on me as a nothing-to-lose trial.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's junk otherwise, so they dumped it on me as a nothing-to-lose trial.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's junk otherwise, so they dumped it on me as a nothing-to-lose trial.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-a trash island?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-a trash island?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-a trash island?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shattered Goliath and Grendel fragments, and test subjects the Northern Union scrapped.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shattered Goliath and Grendel fragments, and test subjects the Northern Union scrapped.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shattered Goliath and Grendel fragments, and test subjects the Northern Union scrapped.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Plus dead weight like Dark Eternium.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Plus dead weight like Dark Eternium.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Plus dead weight like Dark Eternium.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If any of it can be recycled, it helps the village a lot, so they couldn't exactly dump it elsewhere.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If any of it can be recycled, it helps the village a lot, so they couldn't exactly dump it elsewhere.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If any of it can be recycled, it helps the village a lot, so they couldn't exactly dump it elsewhere.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, a fork in the path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, a fork in the path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, a fork in the path.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox. Which way do we go?
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox. Which way do we go?
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox. Which way do we go?

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-right...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-right...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-right...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. We go left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. We go left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. We go left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox doesn't lie.
records.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox doesn't lie.
records.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox doesn't lie.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right is the safer route. The left sector is off-limits due to a malfunction in the security process.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right is the safer route. The left sector is off-limits due to a malfunction in the security process.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right is the safer route. The left sector is off-limits due to a malfunction in the security process.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But the right path takes more time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But the right path takes more time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But the right path takes more time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dragging this out doesn't help you either, does it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dragging this out doesn't help you either, does it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dragging this out doesn't help you either, does it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Natalia? Can we trust her?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Natalia? Can we trust her?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Natalia? Can we trust her?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way Ms. Yulia doesn't know Ms. Lenore is here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way Ms. Yulia doesn't know Ms. Lenore is here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way Ms. Yulia doesn't know Ms. Lenore is here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-so I think her actions are part of the plan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-so I think her actions are part of the plan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-so I think her actions are part of the plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds a little far-fetched, but if it goes south I can always grab her by the hair.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds a little far-fetched, but if it goes south I can always grab her by the hair.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds a little far-fetched, but if it goes south I can always grab her by the hair.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And she is right that we have nothing to gain by stalling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And she is right that we have nothing to gain by stalling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And she is right that we have nothing to gain by stalling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the record, the weapons inside were forced into shutdown while in annihilation mode.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the record, the weapons inside were forced into shutdown while in annihilation mode.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the record, the weapons inside were forced into shutdown while in annihilation mode.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which means if we reboot the programs, the Northern Union weapons will attack us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which means if we reboot the programs, the Northern Union weapons will attack us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which means if we reboot the programs, the Northern Union weapons will attack us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ready?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ready?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ready?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need to get ready to take on a pile of scrap.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need to get ready to take on a pile of scrap.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need to get ready to take on a pile of scrap.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're short on time, so let's wrap this up fast.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're short on time, so let's wrap this up fast.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're short on time, so let's wrap this up fast.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, you have pretty much everything you need. Did you set up house here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, you have pretty much everything you need. Did you set up house here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, you have pretty much everything you need. Did you set up house here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you on about? I'm only staying for a bit in exchange for passing Northern Union intel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you on about? I'm only staying for a bit in exchange for passing Northern Union intel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you on about? I'm only staying for a bit in exchange for passing Northern Union intel.

root.m_Talk_DEU: The Nether God's possibility sifted the living souls and affected the voice of wind that hears life's intent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Nether God's possibility sifted the living souls and affected the voice of wind that hears life's intent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But right now, no matter which future I look at, it is the same.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But right now, no matter which future I look at, it is the same.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But right now, no matter which future I look at, it is the same.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Roots burst out everywhere and wrap the world, and only darkness remains...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Roots burst out everywhere and wrap the world, and only darkness remains...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Roots burst out everywhere and wrap the world, and only darkness remains...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every future I saw ends like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every future I saw ends like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every future I saw ends like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even combing through the memories I got from the clone, there was never anything like this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even combing through the memories I got from the clone, there was never anything like this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even combing through the memories I got from the clone, there was never anything like this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what does that have to do with helping us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what does that have to do with helping us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what does that have to do with helping us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Simple.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Simple.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Simple.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I help you, who came at Felix's request, I saddle her with a debt, and...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I help you, who came at Felix's request, I saddle her with a debt, and...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I help you, who came at Felix's request, I saddle her with a debt, and...

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the future I saw, just before the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots swallowed Chamber, you were still resisting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the future I saw, just before the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots swallowed Chamber, you were still resisting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the future I saw, just before the Grand Dimension Crevice's roots swallowed Chamber, you were still resisting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That means wherever you are becomes the battlefield. Helping you protects me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That means wherever you are becomes the battlefield. Helping you protects me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That means wherever you are becomes the battlefield. Helping you protects me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well. Does that convince you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well. Does that convince you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well. Does that convince you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Better than waving some lofty cause around.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Better than waving some lofty cause around.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Better than waving some lofty cause around.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So how exactly are you planning to help us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So how exactly are you planning to help us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So how exactly are you planning to help us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't play dumb. It's obvious why Felix sent you to Ciringrad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't play dumb. It's obvious why Felix sent you to Ciringrad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't play dumb. It's obvious why Felix sent you to Ciringrad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know a little-used route to the Matryoshka Research Lab. You only need to follow me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know a little-used route to the Matryoshka Research Lab. You only need to follow me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know a little-used route to the Matryoshka Research Lab. You only need to follow me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what do we do there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what do we do there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what do we do there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?! Do you seriously not know anything?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?! Do you seriously not know anything?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?! Do you seriously not know anything?

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-well... th-that's because you showed up in the middle of my briefing, Ms. Lenore.
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-well... th-that's because you showed up in the middle of my briefing, Ms. Lenore.
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-well... th-that's because you showed up in the middle of my briefing, Ms. Lenore.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yanikka is out of it right now. She doesn't know anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yanikka is out of it right now. She doesn't know anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yanikka is out of it right now. She doesn't know anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey. You could phrase that more nicely, you know.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey. You could phrase that more nicely, you know.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey. You could phrase that more nicely, you know.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You could at least call it an airheaded charm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You could at least call it an airheaded charm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You could at least call it an airheaded charm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. What on earth made that woman send people like you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. What on earth made that woman send people like you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. What on earth made that woman send people like you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So? What did Felix ask you to get?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So? What did Felix ask you to get?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So? What did Felix ask you to get?

root.m_Talk_ENG: M-Ms. Yulia said we need to bring back two items from here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: M-Ms. Yulia said we need to bring back two items from here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: M-Ms. Yulia said we need to bring back two items from here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-one is... the altered Dark Eternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-one is... the altered Dark Eternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-one is... the altered Dark Eternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the other is...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the other is...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the other is...

root.m_Talk_ENG: A <color=#ffd34c>Bronze Memory Core</color> for a Project Matryoshka compatible subject.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A <color=#ffd34c>Bronze Memory Core</color> for a Project Matryoshka compatible subject.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A <color=#ffd34c>Bronze Memory Core</color> for a Project Matryoshka compatible subject.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Then we head inside the lab now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Then we head inside the lab now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Then we head inside the lab now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So stop hiding in weird spots and come out. I'm embarrassed for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So stop hiding in weird spots and come out. I'm embarrassed for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So stop hiding in weird spots and come out. I'm embarrassed for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Says the one who dropped her pride and chose to play slave. We can't afford to get spotted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Says the one who dropped her pride and chose to play slave. We can't afford to get spotted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Says the one who dropped her pride and chose to play slave. We can't afford to get spotted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you I can see what's about to happen. And who are you calling a slave?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you I can see what's about to happen. And who are you calling a slave?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you I can see what's about to happen. And who are you calling a slave?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-that access card... it's not Northern Union-issued, but was machined here in Ciringrad.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-that access card... it's not Northern Union-issued, but was machined here in Ciringrad.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that access card... it's not Northern Union-issued, but was machined here in Ciringrad.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How do you even have that, Ms. Lenore?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How do you even have that, Ms. Lenore?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How do you even have that, Ms. Lenore?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. You think Ciringrad can independently analyze byproducts from our latest projects?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. You think Ciringrad can independently analyze byproducts from our latest projects?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. You think Ciringrad can independently analyze byproducts from our latest projects?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's junk otherwise, so they dumped it on me as a nothing-to-lose trial.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's junk otherwise, so they dumped it on me as a nothing-to-lose trial.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's junk otherwise, so they dumped it on me as a nothing-to-lose trial.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-a trash island?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-a trash island?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-a trash island?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shattered Goliath and Grendel fragments, and test subjects the Northern Union scrapped.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shattered Goliath and Grendel fragments, and test subjects the Northern Union scrapped.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shattered Goliath and Grendel fragments, and test subjects the Northern Union scrapped.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Plus dead weight like Dark Eternium.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Plus dead weight like Dark Eternium.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Plus dead weight like Dark Eternium.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If any of it can be recycled, it helps the village a lot, so they couldn't exactly dump it elsewhere.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If any of it can be recycled, it helps the village a lot, so they couldn't exactly dump it elsewhere.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If any of it can be recycled, it helps the village a lot, so they couldn't exactly dump it elsewhere.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah, a fork in the path.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah, a fork in the path.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah, a fork in the path.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox. Which way do we go?
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox. Which way do we go?
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox. Which way do we go?

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-right...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-right...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-right...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. We go left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. We go left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. We go left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: F-Fluffox doesn't lie.
root.m_Talk_DEU: F-Fluffox doesn't lie.
root.m_Talk_FRA: F-Fluffox doesn't lie.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Arf.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Arf.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Arf.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Right is the safer route. The left sector is off-limits due to a malfunction in the security process.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Right is the safer route. The left sector is off-limits due to a malfunction in the security process.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Right is the safer route. The left sector is off-limits due to a malfunction in the security process.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But the right path takes more time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But the right path takes more time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But the right path takes more time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dragging this out doesn't help you either, does it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dragging this out doesn't help you either, does it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dragging this out doesn't help you either, does it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think, Natalia? Can we trust her?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think, Natalia? Can we trust her?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think, Natalia? Can we trust her?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no way Ms. Yulia doesn't know Ms. Lenore is here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no way Ms. Yulia doesn't know Ms. Lenore is here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no way Ms. Yulia doesn't know Ms. Lenore is here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-so I think her actions are part of the plan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-so I think her actions are part of the plan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-so I think her actions are part of the plan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sounds a little far-fetched, but if it goes south I can always grab her by the hair.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sounds a little far-fetched, but if it goes south I can always grab her by the hair.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sounds a little far-fetched, but if it goes south I can always grab her by the hair.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And she is right that we have nothing to gain by stalling.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And she is right that we have nothing to gain by stalling.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And she is right that we have nothing to gain by stalling.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For the record, the weapons inside were forced into shutdown while in annihilation mode.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For the record, the weapons inside were forced into shutdown while in annihilation mode.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For the record, the weapons inside were forced into shutdown while in annihilation mode.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which means if we reboot the programs, the Northern Union weapons will attack us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which means if we reboot the programs, the Northern Union weapons will attack us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which means if we reboot the programs, the Northern Union weapons will attack us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ready?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ready?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ready?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't need to get ready to take on a pile of scrap.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't need to get ready to take on a pile of scrap.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't need to get ready to take on a pile of scrap.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're short on time, so let's wrap this up fast.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're short on time, so let's wrap this up fast.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're short on time, so let's wrap this up fast.
